tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreCreateGroup.createGroup
tools.description: Creates a group within the specified identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreCreateGroupMembership.createGroupMembership
tools.description: Creates a relationship between a member and a group. The following identifiers must be specified: GroupId, IdentityStoreId, and MemberId.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreCreateUser.createUser
tools.description: Creates a user within the specified identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDeleteGroup.deleteGroup
tools.description: Delete a group within an identity store given GroupId.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDeleteGroupMembership.deleteGroupMembership
tools.description: Delete a membership within a group given MembershipId.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDeleteUser.deleteUser
tools.description: Deletes a user within an identity store given UserId.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDescribeGroup.describeGroup
tools.description: Retrieves the group metadata and attributes from GroupId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDescribeGroupMembership.describeGroupMembership
tools.description: Retrieves membership metadata and attributes from MembershipId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreDescribeUser.describeUser
tools.description: Retrieves the user metadata and attributes from the UserId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreGetGroupId.getGroupId
tools.description: Retrieves GroupId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreGetGroupMembershipId.getGroupMembershipId
tools.description: Retrieves the MembershipId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreGetUserId.getUserId
tools.description: Retrieves the UserId in an identity store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreIsMemberInGroups.isMemberInGroups
tools.description: Checks the user's membership in all requested groups and returns if the member exists in all queried groups.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreListGroupMemberships.listGroupMemberships
tools.description: For the specified group in the specified identity store, returns the list of all GroupMembership objects and returns results in paginated form.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreListGroupMembershipsForMember.listGroupMembershipsForMember
tools.description: For the specified member in the specified identity store, returns the list of all GroupMembership objects and returns results in paginated form.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreListGroups.listGroups
tools.description: Lists all groups in the identity store. Returns a paginated list of complete Group objects. Filtering for a Group by the DisplayName attribute is deprecated. Instead, use the GetGroupId API action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreListUsers.listUsers
tools.description: Lists all users in the identity store. Returns a paginated list of complete User objects. Filtering for a User by the UserName attribute is deprecated. Instead, use the GetUserId API action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreUpdateGroup.updateGroup
tools.description: For the specified group in the specified identity store, updates the group metadata and attributes.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsIdentityStoreUpdateUser.updateUser
tools.description: For the specified user in the specified identity store, updates the user metadata and attributes.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
